title: Time Horizon Portrait
promise: How do you relate to past, present, and future? Five time orientations inspired by Zimbardo Time Perspective — none prescribed as the right one.
description: 15 original Likert items across five time orientations (Past-Positive, Past-Negative, Present-Hedonistic, Present-Fatalistic, Future-Oriented). Result shows a radar of your dominant orientations and where each one costs or helps. Inspired by Zimbardo Time Perspective concepts; items are original.
ogDescription: How do you relate to past, present, and future? 15 items, ~3 min. Private by design.
